bench_setup.notes: GPIO→ADC loopback: PC0 (output, also LED1 active-low) drives HIGH/LOW; PC1 (ADC1_INP11 analog input, also LED2) reads back. GPIO output impedance dominates LED resistor — LED influence negligible. PASS: HIGH raw>3500, LOW raw<500. detail0 = (high_raw<<16)|low_raw. Wire required: PC0 → PC1.

peripheral_signals.notes: Push-pull output. Drives HIGH then LOW. Wire: PC0 → PC1.
ADC1_INP11 analog input. Wire: PC0 → PC1.
